name: avengers
description: An unofficial Avengers/Tony Stark operating-system skill pack with 107 A-prefixed skills.

interface.shortDescription: 107 A-prefixed Avengers and Tony Stark operating skills.
interface.longDescription: Avengers turns Tony Stark, Iron Man, MCU story analysis, leadership, risk, prototyping, resourcefulness, mentorship, and corpus knowledge into local Codex skills.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use a-stark-router to choose and apply the right Avengers skill.
